name: now-playing
title: Now Playing
description: Show the currently playing track and artist in the Raycast menu bar.
author: kendaniels

commands.name: now-playing-menubar
commands.title: Now Playing Menu Bar Item
commands.description: Show currently playing track and artist in the macOS menu bar.

preferences.name: menuBarDisplayMode
preferences.title: Menu Bar Display
preferences.description: Choose whether the menu bar shows text, artwork, or both.

preferences.name: menuBarTitleTemplate
preferences.title: Menu Bar Title Template
preferences.description: Used when Menu Bar Display is set to Custom Template. Available variables: {track}, {artist}, {album}.

preferences.name: showAlbumArtwork
preferences.title: Show Album Artwork
preferences.description: Show album artwork alongside the title in Track + Artist and Custom Template modes.
preferences.label: Show album artwork alongside text when supported
